meanings.definition: becoming proficient in the use of something; having mastery of
examples: his mastering the art of cooking took a long time

meanings.definition: the act of making a master recording from which copies can be made
examples: he received a bill for mastering the concert and making 100 copies

meanings.definition: be or become completely proficient or skilled in
examples: She mastered Japanese in less than two years

meanings.definition: get on top of; deal with successfully
have dominance or the power to defeat over
examples: The methods can master the problems

meanings.definition: have a firm understanding or knowledge of; be on top of
